---
title: R
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

<!-- r.md is generated from r.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

* [s4](s4.md)  
* [matrices](matrices.md)  

#### geospatial

<!-- * [geospatial](geospatial.md)   -->
* [osmdata](osmdata.md)  
* [rgdal](rgdal.md)  
* [rgeos](rgeos.md)  
* [sp](sp.md)
